targets.query:
from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature" and r._field == "value_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not (r.source == "labjack" and r.sensor_type == "rtd"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with series: r.source + " " + r.sensor_type + "/" + r.channel }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "series"])
  |> group(columns: ["series"])

from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "temperature" and (r._field == "value_c" or r._field == "value_k" or r._field == "resistance_ohm" or r._field == "emf_mv"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not (r.source == "labjack" and r.sensor_type == "rtd"))
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["source", "sensor_type", "channel", "_field", "_value"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["source", "sensor_type", "channel"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> sort(columns: ["source", "sensor_type", "channel"])

from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "level")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => (r.vessel == "cryostat" and r._field == "filtered") or (r.vessel != "cryostat" and r._field == "raw"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "vessel"])
  |> group(columns: ["vessel"])

panels.title: Heater PID (zone setpoint / PV, K — and output %)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pid_state" and (r._field == "setpoint_k" or r._field == "pv_k" or r._field == "output_pct"))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with series: r.zone + " " + r._field }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "series"])
  |> group(columns: ["series"])

from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "pressure" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with series: r.gauge + "/" + r.channel }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "series"])
  |> group(columns: ["series"])

from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "vacuum" and r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "channel"])
  |> group(columns: ["channel"])

from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "valve_state" and r._field == "state")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "vessel"])
  |> group(columns: ["vessel"])

from(bucket: "xsphere")
  |> range(start: -10m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "service_heartbeat" and r._field == "uptime_s")
  |> last()
